title: Chat and Message basic methods
description: Implement Chat/get, changes, set, query, queryChanges and Message/get, changes, set (create only), query, queryChanges. Chat kinds: direct (maps to nie whisper) and group (maps to nie group_*). Message/set create: serialize to ClearMessage, MLS encrypt, send via relay, store locally with ULID. Message/query requires chatId filter; servers MUST return unsupportedFilter if chatId filter is absent. Default sort receivedAt ascending. unreadCount tracking.
